name: lead-gen-default
description: Suggested policy preset for the lead-gen-agent starter. Cap is sized for ~250 enrichment calls/day at typical per-lead pricing.
notes: $2 approval threshold catches batches and bulk-priced providers — single per-lead lookups should pass through.
Set approval_required=false in the dashboard if the agent runs on a fixed enrichment list and you want unattended runs.
Allowlisted services (gates which registered lead-data providers the agent may pay) are managed in the Canopy dashboard.
